goal: Build a UR10 + surface_gripper canonical: UR10 with an OgnSurfaceGripper suction tool attached to its tool0/ee_link, picks one cube off a stationary feeder. First step toward function-gate-ready UR10 cuRobo (CP-69 had no gripper).
thoughts:
Six UR10+surface-gripper specifics for CP-70 (extends CP-69 with suction gripper for runtime delivery):
1) UR10 base on table at (0, 0, 0.75) — same layout as CP-69.
2) surface_gripper(robot_path='/World/UR10', ee_link='/World/UR10/ee_link') attaches an OgnSurfaceGripper OmniGraph node at UR10's flange.
3) When the suction graph fires its 'close' signal during cuRobo's pick phase, FixedJoint forms between EE and nearest cube. 'Open' signal during release breaks the joint.
4) Stationary feeder (v=0.001) instead of active conveyor — simplifies first-cycle test of suction grip without belt motion confounds.
5) Single cube at known position to make timing deterministic.
6) Realizes the UR10+suction half of #25 / #27 / #33. Function-gate (delivery) becomes possible once we wire _grip_open/_grip_close in the cuRobo handler to drive the suction graph's signal node — that wire-up is the next milestone after this canonical lands.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# UR10 base on table
import_robot(file_path="UR10", format="asset_library", dest_path="/World/UR10")
teleport_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", position=[0, 0, 0.75])

# Suction gripper attached to UR10's ee_link
surface_gripper(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    ee_link="/World/UR10/ee_link",
    grip_threshold=0.02,
    force_limit=200.0,
    torque_limit=200.0,
)

# Stationary feeder (verifier bridge for cube)
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/Feeder",
    position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[0.40, 0.30, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.001, 0, 0],
)

# Single cube on feeder
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", material_name="rubber")

# Output bin
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0.5, -0.3, 0.75], size=[0.25, 0.25, 0.12])

# Pick sensor
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[-0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.10, 0.06, 0.06])

# UR10 cuRobo controller
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/Feeder",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    drop_target=[0.5, -0.3, 0.92],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/Feeder", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-70 extends CP-69 with surface_gripper (OgnSurfaceGripper OmniGraph node) attached to UR10's ee_link. Form-gate validates that the suction graph attaches without breaking the cuRobo install. The cuRobo handler's _grip_open/_grip_close still no-ops (UR10 routed through SingleArticulation, no .gripper attr) — wiring those to drive the suction signal is the next milestone before function-gate becomes attainable. Cobotta variant (originally planned here) deferred: this Isaac Sim install lacks the cobotta_900 manipulator example module.
failure_modes: ee_link path: UR10's USD references the EE prim at /World/UR10/ee_link. If the asset-library-loaded UR10 puts EE elsewhere, surface_gripper will create the graph but the suction beam hits empty space.

**Isaac Sim 5.x API drift**: surface_gripper installer uses pre-5.x OgnSurfaceGripper inputs (parentPath, gripThreshold). The Isaac Sim 5.x OgnSurfaceGripper uses inputs:SurfaceGripper (target prim) + inputs:Toggle, requires a separate USD-level PhysxSurfaceGripper schema prim via robot_schema.CreateSurfaceGripper(). Live inspection of CP-70 shows only OnPlaybackTick child under /World/UR10/SuctionGraph — the SurfaceGripper node creation fails silently, so no actual suction installs. Form-gate still passes because the verifier only checks pipeline-shape, not graph contents. Tracked as task #35.

Suction graph + cuRobo coordination: even after the installer fix lands, cuRobo plans Cartesian motion while the suction graph runs its own schedule. Wiring _grip_open/_grip_close in the cuRobo handler to call the SurfaceGripper's open()/close() methods (or equivalent OmniGraph signal write) is the next milestone before function-gate becomes attainable for UR10.
Same UR10 init quirks as CP-69 — SingleArticulation wrapper, no built-in gripper attr.
Verifier doesn't validate suction graph existence — only checks pickplace pipeline shape. Runtime suction integration is an integration spec milestone.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-08; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (UR10 cuRobo+surface_gripper delivers via raycast workaround)
